usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive reviewed before broad production QA; effective usage was 14.3807 USD while billed amount remained 0.0000 USD.

notes: This run supersedes QA-20260402-0213 as the current broad production reference for the tested core/dashboard/AI surface.
Deployment proof was taken from Vercel inspect: production deployment dpl_HUrc3CAatRmgXyihV3V44t7zuFpS is Ready and serves v8.11.26.
environment.commitSha uses the deployed release commit 644af633956b673bef4aad27b9962dc97cab1ad6 (tag v8.11.26), not the later QA-doc-only commits on main.
404 emitted the expected failed-resource console entry for the synthetic missing route and was treated as non-blocking route-miss noise.
